calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner Daniel John Cram present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Dj Cram.
Decree signed in open court.
